name: Dogs
tagline: Explore dog breeds, groups, and facts
description: List dog breeds with paginated metadata and retrieve small sets of dog facts from the current Dog API V2.

auth.hint: No API key is currently required for the public V2 API.

tools.name: list_breeds
tools.description: List dog breeds and their descriptive, lifespan, weight, and hypoallergenic metadata.

tools.name: list_facts
tools.description: Return one to five dog facts in JSON:API format.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of facts, from 1 through 5; defaults to 1.
